vigil-pretrade.description: VIGIL Full Pre-Trade Report. One call runs multiple onchain security scanners against a Base token (safety score, honeypot detection, community scam DB, liquidity lock) and returns a single aggregated verdict + recommendation. Built for trading agents that want one clean go/no-go signal before they sign.

token.description: Token contract address to scan (0x-prefixed, 40 hex chars)

verdict.description: Overall verdict: safe, low, medium, high, or critical

reasons.description: List of signals behind the verdict

incomplete.description: True if one or more scanners did not return data
